description: Create multiple ledgers to manage different financial accounts (e.g., business, family, personal, etc.).
deleteConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete the ledger "{{name}}"?

⚠️ This action cannot be undone. All records, accounts, debts, etc. in this ledger will be permanently deleted.
requireLoginDetail: Please sign in with Google to join a shared ledger
sharePermissionNoteHtml: Permission Note: Sharing requires read/write file permissions. If the operation fails or you are upgrading from an older version, go to Settings and re-login to authorize.
shareDescription: Enter the other person's Google Email to authorize. Once a share code is generated, they can use it to link to your ledger.
participantNote: You are a participant in this shared ledger. Only the owner can manage sharing permissions.
copyFailed: Copy failed, please select and copy manually
removeUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove sharing permission from "{{email}}"?
cancelShareDesc: After canceling, the cloud shared file will be deleted and this ledger will revert to a personal ledger.
unshareConfirm:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to cancel sharing "{{name}}"?

All participants will lose access, and the cloud shared file will be permanently deleted. Your local data will be retained.
unshareSuccess: Sharing canceled, ledger reverted to personal ledger
shareSuccess: Authorization successful! Share the code with the invitee
joinPermissionNoteHtml: Permission Note: Joining requires read/write file permissions. If the operation fails or you are upgrading from an older version, go to Settings and re-login to authorize.
pickerRecommendLabel: To ensure cloud read/write permissions, it is strongly recommended to load via Google Drive picker.
codeRequiredError: Please enter or select a share code
confirmPicker: Please confirm the authorized file in the next window...
qrScannerFailed: QR scanner module failed to load
cameraAccessDenied: Cannot access camera. Please check browser permission settings.
cameraAccessFailed: Camera access failed or not authorized
